recipes.name: Black Bean Tacos
recipes.prep: 1. Drain and rinse beans, heat in pan with cumin and minced garlic. 2. Warm taco shells in oven. 3. Chop lettuce and dice tomatoes. 4. Assemble tacos with beans, toppings, cheese, and sour cream.

recipes.name: Vegetable Stir Fry with Rice
recipes.prep: 1. Start rice according to package. 2. Chop all vegetables into bite-sized pieces. 3. Heat oil in wok over high heat. 4. Stir fry garlic and ginger 30 seconds. 5. Add carrots first (2 min), then peppers and broccoli (3-4 min). 6. Add soy sauce, toss, serve over rice.

recipes.name: Caprese Pasta
recipes.prep: 1. Cook pasta according to package, reserve 1/2 cup pasta water. 2. Halve tomatoes, cube mozzarella, chiffonade basil. 3. In pan, sauté garlic in olive oil 1 min. 4. Add tomatoes, cook until softened. 5. Toss with pasta, mozzarella, basil, and balsamic. Add pasta water if needed.

recipes.name: Chickpea Curry
recipes.prep: 1. Start rice. 2. Sauté diced onion until soft (5 min). 3. Add garlic and curry powder, cook 1 min. 4. Add tomatoes, coconut milk, and drained chickpeas. 5. Simmer 15 min. 6. Stir in spinach until wilted. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Grilled Cheese and Tomato Soup
recipes.prep: 1. Heat soup in pot according to can directions. 2. Butter outsides of bread slices. 3. Place cheese between bread (butter side out). 4. Grill in pan over medium heat until golden and cheese melts, 3-4 min per side.

recipes.name: Vegetable Quesadillas
recipes.prep: 1. Slice peppers and onion, sauté until soft (5-7 min). 2. Drain and rinse beans. 3. Place tortilla in dry pan, add cheese, veggies, beans to one half. 4. Fold and cook until golden (2-3 min per side). 5. Serve with salsa and sour cream.

recipes.name: Pasta Primavera
recipes.prep: 1. Cook pasta, reserve pasta water. 2. Slice zucchini and squash into half-moons, halve tomatoes. 3. Sauté garlic in olive oil 30 sec. 4. Add squash, cook 5 min. Add tomatoes, cook 2 min more. 5. Season with Italian seasoning. 6. Toss with pasta and parmesan.

recipes.name: Bean and Cheese Burritos
recipes.prep: 1. Heat refried beans in pot or microwave. 2. Warm tortillas in dry pan or microwave. 3. Spread beans down center of tortilla. 4. Add rice, cheese, lettuce. 5. Top with salsa and sour cream. 6. Fold sides in, then roll up tightly.

recipes.name: Mushroom Risotto
recipes.prep: 1. Heat broth, keep warm. 2. Sauté sliced mushrooms in 1 tbsp butter, set aside. 3. Sauté onion and garlic in remaining butter. 4. Add rice, toast 2 min. 5. Add wine, stir until absorbed. 6. Add broth 1/2 cup at a time, stirring until absorbed. 7. Stir in mushrooms and parmesan.

recipes.name: Greek Salad with Pita
recipes.prep: 1. Chop cucumber and tomatoes into chunks. 2. Thinly slice red onion. 3. Combine veggies with olives in bowl. 4. Crumble feta over top. 5. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. 6. Warm pita in oven or toaster. Serve alongside.

recipes.name: Spinach and Ricotta Stuffed Shells
recipes.prep: 1. Cook shells until just al dente, drain. 2. Thaw and squeeze dry spinach. 3. Mix ricotta, spinach, egg, garlic, half the mozzarella. 4. Spread half marinara in baking dish. 5. Fill shells, place in dish. 6. Top with remaining sauce and cheese. 7. Bake 375°F for 25 min.

recipes.name: Pad Thai (Vegetarian)
recipes.prep: 1. Soak noodles in hot water until soft. 2. Press and cube tofu, fry until golden. 3. Scramble eggs, set aside. 4. Stir fry noodles with soy sauce. 5. Add tofu, eggs, bean sprouts, sliced green onions. 6. Serve with crushed peanuts and lime wedges.

recipes.name: Minestrone Soup
recipes.prep: 1. Dice onion, carrots, celery, zucchini. 2. Sauté onion, carrots, celery 5 min. 3. Add broth, tomatoes, bring to boil. 4. Add pasta, cook 5 min. 5. Add zucchini and drained beans, cook 5 min more. 6. Season with salt, pepper, Italian herbs.

recipes.name: Falafel Wraps
recipes.prep: 1. Prepare falafel mix according to package (usually add water, form patties, pan fry). 2. Dice cucumber and tomatoes. 3. Slice red onion thinly. 4. Warm pita. 5. Spread tzatziki on pita, add falafel, veggies, and lettuce. Roll up.

recipes.name: Margherita Pizza
recipes.prep: 1. Preheat oven to 450°F (or highest setting). 2. Stretch dough on floured surface. 3. Transfer to oiled baking sheet or pizza stone. 4. Spread sauce, leaving border. 5. Add torn mozzarella pieces. 6. Bake 12-15 min until crust is golden. 7. Top with fresh basil and olive oil drizzle.

recipes.name: Lentil Soup
recipes.prep: 1. Rinse lentils. 2. Dice onion, carrots, celery. 3. Sauté veggies with garlic 5 min. 4. Add cumin, cook 1 min. 5. Add broth, tomatoes, lentils. 6. Bring to boil, then simmer 20-25 min until lentils are tender. Season to taste.

recipes.name: Cheese Ravioli with Marinara
recipes.prep: 1. Boil large pot of salted water. 2. Cook ravioli according to package (usually 4-6 min). 3. Meanwhile, heat marinara in separate pot. 4. Drain ravioli, plate. 5. Top with warm marinara, parmesan, and fresh basil.

recipes.name: Veggie Fried Rice
recipes.prep: 1. Use cold/day-old rice for best results. 2. Scramble eggs, set aside. 3. Stir fry diced carrots 3 min. 4. Add garlic and peas, cook 2 min. 5. Add rice, break up clumps. 6. Add soy sauce and sesame oil. 7. Fold in eggs and sliced green onions.

recipes.name: Caprese Sandwich
recipes.prep: 1. Slice ciabatta rolls horizontally. 2. Slice mozzarella and tomatoes. 3. Layer mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil on bread. 4. Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze. 5. Season with salt and pepper. Close sandwich.

recipes.name: Black Bean Soup
recipes.prep: 1. Sauté diced onion 5 min. 2. Add garlic and cumin, cook 1 min. 3. Add drained beans and broth. 4. Simmer 15 min. 5. Blend half the soup for creamier texture (optional). 6. Serve with lime juice, sour cream, and cilantro.

recipes.name: Vegetable Lo Mein
recipes.prep: 1. Cook noodles according to package. 2. Slice all vegetables. 3. Stir fry garlic and ginger 30 sec. 4. Add carrots (2 min), then broccoli, peppers, mushrooms (3-4 min). 5. Add noodles and soy sauce. 6. Toss everything together until heated through.

recipes.name: Spinach Artichoke Pasta
recipes.prep: 1. Cook pasta, reserve 1 cup pasta water. 2. Sauté garlic 1 min. 3. Add cream cheese and milk, stir until smooth. 4. Add drained and chopped artichokes. 5. Add spinach, cook until wilted. 6. Toss with pasta and parmesan. Add pasta water if needed.

recipes.name: Shakshuka
recipes.prep: 1. Sauté diced onion and peppers 5 min. 2. Add garlic, cumin, paprika, cook 1 min. 3. Add tomatoes, simmer 10 min until thickened. 4. Make 4 wells, crack an egg into each. 5. Cover, cook 5-8 min until eggs set. 6. Crumble feta on top. Serve with crusty bread.

recipes.name: Pesto Pasta
recipes.prep: 1. Cook pasta, reserve 1/2 cup pasta water. 2. Halve cherry tomatoes. 3. Toast pine nuts in dry pan until golden. 4. Toss hot pasta with pesto. 5. Add tomatoes and parmesan. 6. Add pasta water if too thick. Top with pine nuts.

recipes.name: Huevos Rancheros
recipes.prep: 1. Heat beans with a splash of their liquid. 2. Warm tortillas in dry pan. 3. Fry eggs sunny-side up or to preference. 4. Layer: tortilla, beans, egg, salsa, cheese. 5. Top with sliced avocado and sour cream.

recipes.name: Tomato Basil Soup
recipes.prep: 1. Sauté diced onion in olive oil 5 min. 2. Add garlic, cook 1 min. 3. Add tomatoes and broth, simmer 15 min. 4. Blend until smooth (immersion blender works great). 5. Stir in cream and chopped basil. Season to taste.

recipes.name: Vegetable Curry with Naan
recipes.prep: 1. Cube potatoes, cut cauliflower into florets. 2. Sauté onion 5 min. 3. Add garlic and curry paste, cook 1 min. 4. Add coconut milk and potatoes, simmer 10 min. 5. Add cauliflower, cook 10 min. 6. Stir in peas last 2 min. 7. Warm naan, serve alongside.

recipes.name: Three Bean Chili
recipes.prep: 1. Sauté diced onion 5 min. 2. Add garlic, chili powder, cumin, cook 1 min. 3. Add tomatoes and all beans (drained). 4. Add 1 cup water. 5. Simmer 20 min, stirring occasionally. 6. Serve with cheese, sour cream, cornbread.

recipes.name: Eggplant Parmesan
recipes.prep: 1. Slice eggplant into 1/2 inch rounds, salt and let sit 15 min, pat dry. 2. Set up breading: flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs. 3. Bread each slice. 4. Pan fry until golden (3 min per side). 5. Layer in baking dish: sauce, eggplant, cheese. Repeat. 6. Bake 375°F for 20 min.

recipes.name: Buddha Bowl
recipes.prep: 1. Cook quinoa according to package. 2. Cube sweet potato, roast at 400°F for 20 min. 3. Drain chickpeas, toss with oil and spices, roast 15 min. 4. Massage kale with olive oil and salt. 5. Make dressing: tahini + lemon juice + garlic + water. 6. Assemble bowls, drizzle with dressing.

recipes.name: Mac and Cheese
recipes.prep: 1. Cook macaroni according to package. 2. Melt butter, whisk in flour, cook 1 min. 3. Slowly whisk in milk, cook until thickened. 4. Remove from heat, stir in cheese until melted. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Toss with pasta.

recipes.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
recipes.prep: 1. Cut tops off peppers, remove seeds. 2. Mix rice, drained beans, corn, half the cheese, salsa, cumin. 3. Stuff peppers with mixture. 4. Place in baking dish with 1/4 inch water. 5. Cover with foil, bake 375°F for 25 min. 6. Uncover, top with remaining cheese, bake 5 min more.

recipes.name: Vegetable Teriyaki
recipes.prep: 1. Cook rice if not already made. 2. Slice carrots into coins. 3. Stir fry carrots 3 min. 4. Add broccoli and snap peas, cook 4 min. 5. Add teriyaki sauce, toss to coat. 6. Serve over rice, garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onions.

recipes.name: Bruschetta
recipes.prep: 1. Slice baguette into 1/2 inch rounds. 2. Brush with olive oil, toast under broiler until golden. 3. Dice tomatoes, mix with chopped basil, minced garlic, remaining oil, and balsamic. 4. Rub toast with cut garlic clove. 5. Top with tomato mixture and torn mozzarella.

recipes.name: Coconut Rice with Vegetables
recipes.prep: 1. Cook rice in coconut milk + 1/2 cup water. 2. Slice peppers and carrots. 3. Stir fry vegetables until crisp-tender (5 min). 4. Add peas last 2 min. 5. Season with soy sauce. 6. Serve veggies over coconut rice with lime wedges.

recipes.name: Avocado Toast
recipes.prep: 1. Toast bread to desired crispness. 2. Mash avocados with lemon juice and salt. 3. Fry or poach eggs. 4. Halve cherry tomatoes. 5. Spread avocado on toast. 6. Top with egg, tomatoes, and red pepper flakes.

recipes.name: Tortellini Soup
recipes.prep: 1. Sauté garlic 1 min. 2. Add broth, tomatoes, Italian seasoning, bring to boil. 3. Add tortellini, cook according to package time. 4. Stir in spinach until wilted. 5. Serve topped with parmesan.

recipes.name: Taco Salad
recipes.prep: 1. Chop lettuce, dice tomatoes. 2. Heat and season beans with cumin if desired. 3. Arrange lettuce in bowls. 4. Top with beans, corn, tomatoes, cheese. 5. Add crushed tortilla chips. 6. Drizzle with salsa and sour cream.

recipes.name: Garlic Butter Pasta
recipes.prep: 1. Cook pasta, reserve 1 cup pasta water. 2. Melt butter over medium-low heat. 3. Add sliced garlic, cook until golden (2-3 min). 4. Add red pepper flakes. 5. Toss with pasta and parmesan. 6. Add pasta water if needed. Top with parsley.

recipes.name: Sweet Potato Black Bean Tacos
recipes.prep: 1. Peel and small-dice sweet potatoes. 2. Roast at 400°F for 20 min, or pan-fry with cumin until tender. 3. Heat and season beans. 4. Warm tortillas. 5. Fill with sweet potato, beans, sliced avocado. 6. Top with cheese, cilantro, and lime juice.

recipes.name: Ramen Noodle Stir Fry
recipes.prep: 1. Cook ramen (discard seasoning packets), drain. 2. Scramble eggs, set aside. 3. Stir fry shredded cabbage and julienned carrots 3-4 min. 4. Add noodles, soy sauce, sesame oil. 5. Fold in eggs and sliced green onions.

recipes.name: White Bean and Kale Soup
recipes.prep: 1. Dice onion, carrots, celery. 2. Sauté in olive oil 5-7 min. 3. Add garlic and Italian seasoning, cook 1 min. 4. Add broth and drained beans. 5. Simmer 15 min. 6. Add chopped kale, cook 5 min until tender. Season to taste.

recipes.name: Nachos Supreme
recipes.prep: 1. Spread chips on baking sheet. 2. Top with drained beans and cheese. 3. Broil 3-5 min until cheese melts. 4. Top with jalapenos, diced tomatoes. 5. Dollop with salsa, sour cream, and guacamole. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Mushroom Stroganoff
recipes.prep: 1. Cook egg noodles. 2. Slice mushrooms and onion. 3. Sauté onion in butter 5 min. 4. Add mushrooms, cook until browned (8 min). 5. Add garlic and thyme, cook 1 min. 6. Add broth, simmer 5 min. 7. Remove from heat, stir in sour cream. Serve over noodles.

recipes.name: Corn and Black Bean Salad
recipes.prep: 1. Drain corn and beans. 2. Dice bell peppers and red onion. 3. Combine in large bowl. 4. Add chopped cilantro. 5. Dress with lime juice, olive oil, and cumin. 6. Toss well, refrigerate 15 min if time allows. Great with chips or as a side.

recipes.name: Veggie Pita Pockets
recipes.prep: 1. Cut pitas in half to form pockets. 2. Dice cucumber and tomatoes. 3. Thinly slice red onion. 4. Spread hummus inside each pita pocket. 5. Stuff with lettuce, cucumber, tomatoes, onion. 6. Crumble feta on top.

recipes.name: Tofu Scramble
recipes.prep: 1. Press tofu to remove excess water. 2. Dice peppers and onion. 3. Sauté onion and peppers 5 min. 4. Crumble tofu into pan. 5. Add garlic, turmeric, nutritional yeast. 6. Cook 5-7 min until heated through. 7. Add spinach, cook until wilted. Season with salt and pepper.

recipes.name: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
recipes.prep: 1. Cook spaghetti, reserve 1 cup pasta water. 2. Thinly slice garlic. 3. Heat olive oil over medium-low, add garlic. 4. Cook until light golden (3-4 min). 5. Add red pepper flakes. 6. Toss with pasta and parsley. Add pasta water if needed. Top with parmesan.

recipes.name: Cheese and Vegetable Frittata
recipes.prep: 1. Preheat broiler. 2. Whisk eggs with milk, salt, pepper. 3. Sauté diced onion and peppers in oven-safe pan. 4. Add spinach, cook until wilted. 5. Pour eggs over veggies, top with cheese. 6. Cook on stovetop until edges set (5 min). 7. Broil until top is golden (2-3 min).

recipes.name: Mediterranean Couscous
recipes.prep: 1. Cook couscous according to package (usually just add boiling water and cover 5 min). 2. Fluff with fork, let cool slightly. 3. Dice cucumber, tomatoes, red onion. 4. Halve olives. 5. Toss couscous with veggies, lemon juice, olive oil. 6. Crumble feta on top.
